_purpose: Declares every network destination this deployment may call. build/check-egress.mjs asserts no request succeeds to a destination outside allowed_egress_destinations.

allowed_egress_destinations.description: The founded EpiStack Competition Community, this deployment's default community: 19 claims, thirteen checked (mechanical protocol claims plus the first admitted contribution), six asserted (the submission's own evaluative theses, awaiting semantic acceptance).
This deployment's own governance kernel: 19 claims, all nineteen checked. Stage 3's grounding is complete as of Phase B/C.
Upstream's math kernel, an EpiStack content corpus for contrast, emitted directly from the pinned submodule.
